name: clear-pr
description: Write PR titles and descriptions in anandyandawang's house style. Title: a lowercase imperative summary, like a commit subject (no ticket prefix). Body: a single `## What?` section that leads with the change then the why. Lead with what + why, link evidence instead of inlining, backtick every code identifier, be honest about tradeoffs, and size the description to the change. Applies automatically whenever Claude opens a pull request or drafts a PR description; invoke /clear-pr to apply the format on demand.
